languages.text: "Фактотум, я, Лорд-капитан, не дозволяю тебе удалиться".

traits.locale_text: "Фактотум, я, Лорд-капитан, не дозволяю тебе удалиться".

languages.text: "High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."
languages.original_text: "Фактотум, я, Лорд-капитан, не дозволяю тебе удалиться".

traits.locale_text: "Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."
"Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

"High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

languages.text: «Sumo Factótum: yo, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán, no le permito que se retire».
languages.original_text: "High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

traits.locale_text: «Sumo Factótum: yo, {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán, no le permito que se retire».

languages.text: “高阶顾问，作为舰长大人，我不许你退下。”
languages.original_text: "High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

traits.locale_text: “高阶顾问，作为舰长大人，我不许你退下。”

languages.text: « Je vous interdis formellement de prendre congé, haut factotum. Ordre du seigneur-capitainede la seigneure-capitaine. »
languages.original_text: "High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous interdis formellement de prendre congé, haut factotum. Ordre du seigneur-capitainede la seigneure-capitaine. »

languages.text: "Arşıkâhya, Lord Kaptan olarak gitmene izin vermiyorum."
languages.original_text: "High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

traits.locale_text: "Arşıkâhya, Lord Kaptan olarak gitmene izin vermiyorum."

languages.text: 「高官、私は艦長として、貴殿の退席を許さない」
languages.original_text: "High Factotum, I, the Lord Captain, do not permit you to take your leave."

traits.locale_text: 「高官、私は艦長として、貴殿の退席を許さない」

languages.text: "Hoch-Faktotum, ich, der Lord Captain, gestatte nicht, dass Ihr geht."
